Elementos/view/zoomAndPanDeprecated.name: zoomAndPanDeprecated
Elementos/view/zoomAndPanDeprecated.description: This attribute specifies whether the SVG document can be magnified and panned.Value type:disable | magnify;Default value: magnify;Animatable:no
